scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,blog,admin -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev --workspace @blog/api" "npm run dev --workspace @blog/blog-client" "npm run dev --workspace @blog/admin-client"
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:e2e: npm run prisma:generate --workspace @blog/api && npm run db:prepare:test && playwright test
